verifyCommand: uv run --extra vision --extra graph pytest && uvx ruff check .
acceptanceCriteria: Verification passes (uv run --extra vision --extra graph pytest && uvx ruff check .)
All non-skipped features completed (passes: true)
All pre-existing tests still pass unchanged
notes: LOOP 5 — agentic-KYB (know-your-business) EXTERNAL-EVIDENCE layer. THESIS: relief-probe has repeatedly found that AI/ML wins at RETRIEVAL / bringing NEW information, not at row-wise prediction over the loans' own fields (prosecuted loans look plausible individually — 4 honest prediction negatives this project). The one untried 'new information' avenue is KYB: verifying a borrower against EXTERNAL sources (does it exist? registered when? real address?), the angle with the strongest published fraud evidence (Benesch: 53% of PPP fraud involved a fabricated/backdated business; Griffin, Kruger & Mahajan J.Finance 2023: 'non-registered business' + 'formed right before the loan' are validated indicators). TWO TIERS: TIER A (free, NO API, validatable NOW) — the loans table already carries business_age_description (100% populated: 'Startup, Loan Funds will Open Business' = near-explicit eligibility red flag since PPP required operation by Feb-15-2020; 'New Business or 2 years or less'; 'Change of Ownership'; 'Existing or more than 2 years old'; 'Unanswered') + date_approved (100%). A LABEL-FREE business-recency detector flags the new/startup/change tells. TIER B (external KYB, RATE-LIMITED ~50/day, real validation is a MANUAL legally-reviewed follow-on) — an OpenCorporates client fetching the precise registration date + non-registered flag + address type for the TOP-K composite leads, refining Tier A. AUTONOMY BOUNDARY (critical): this loop FULLY validates Tier A offline, but only builds Tier-B MACHINERY against a deterministic StubProvider — it must NOT claim a Tier-B result; the real OpenCorporates run is an explicit manual follow-on (documented in KYB-005), never an autonomous iteration. DISPOSITION: EXPLORATORY only (SIGN-010) — never auto-promote into all_detectors()/composite; promotion is a MANUAL human decision after real-data lift. An honest NEGATIVE (Tier-A recency = an eligibility tell, not necessarily a fraud tell) is an acceptable, documented outcome. BRANCH NOTE: runs on the PR branch m7-tier1-and-m8-ai-followups (deps it reuses — similarity/core, benchmark.temporal_label_split, embeddings — live only here, not main). REUSE (exact): config.py::load_env + raw_dir()/data_dir() (cache to raw_dir()/kyb/; add kyb_cache_dir() + opencorporates_token()); requests (CORE dep — no new extra) + labels/doj.py::_fetch_page retry/backoff (requests.Session + time.sleep(2**attempt), catch (requests.RequestException, ValueError)) + ingest/download.py cache-by-existence; the key-gate/lazy-import/bounded-ThreadPoolExecutor/retry/n_errors-telemetry/hard-cap pattern from triage/judge.py::LlmJudge + triage/core.py (MAX_TRIAGE, select_candidates, rerank, telemetry); scoring.composite_ranking(con, limit=k); detectors/base.py (Detector/Signal) + registry.py (exploratory_detectors, SIGN-010) + graph/detector.py (the label-free exploratory detector template); labels/resolve.py::normalize_name + US_STATES + score_match (to disambiguate a loan borrower to the right OpenCorporates record); agent/graph.py::_synthesize_narrative + similarity/explain.py (deterministic_summary + key-gated explain_* — the OPTIONAL agentic LLM narrating the KYB dossier from grounded facts only); benchmark/core.py::temporal_label_split + ranking_metrics + positive_rank_stats; scripts/validate_ring_graph.py (read-only validation-harness template + its importlib-by-path unit-test pattern). GUARDRAILS (plans/guardrails.md SIGN-### + these): (1) DETERMINISTIC-FIRST — everything builds + tests with NO network and NO token (StubProvider default; OpenCorporatesProvider lazy + raises a clear RuntimeError if OPENCORPORATES_TOKEN absent; the LLM behind the `agent` extra). External client tested ONLY via an injected transport (monkeypatch requests.Session.get or inject session=) — NEVER a real network call in any test. (2) Tier-A detector is LABEL-FREE (SIGN-012) — never reads fraud_cases; prove with an empty-fraud_cases test. (3) EXPLORATORY only (SIGN-010). (4) NEVER touch the real data/relief_probe.duckdb in tests — seed a tmp_path warehouse via warehouse.connect(...). (5) Hard cap (MAX_KYB) on external calls + cache to disk + bounded concurrency + telemetry (cost/rate-limit visible); quota-exhausted mid-run stops clean and preserves cached results. (6) No invented benchmark NUMBERS in docs — qualitative; real Tier-A numbers filled ONLY after the KYB-004 script is run (a step done OUTSIDE the loop). (7) RESPONSIBLE_USE: KYB names real businesses/people — FCRA-adjacency when scoring named INDIVIDUALS/sole-props; defamation/false-positive harm; OpenCorporates ToS (free-tier share-alike + attribution via a stored raw_ref, NO account-creation-to-bypass-gates); leads-not-proof. (8) 'Unanswered' business_age → NO fire (never score missing-as-suspicious — that manufactures lift from a data-quality artifact). (9) Entity key loan_number (str). (10) Style: from __future__ import annotations, typed, docstrings, ruff line-length 90. Commit ONE feature per iteration; set passes=true; update plans/progress.md (Learnings); re-read plans/guardrails.md each iteration.

features.title: Tier-A label-free business-recency detector (exploratory, validatable now)
acceptanceCriteria: New src/relief_probe/detectors/business_recency.py defining BusinessRecencyDetector(Detector), detector_id='business_recency', one-line summary; EXPLORATORY/SIGN-010 + LABEL-FREE docstring mirroring graph/detector.py.

Fires on the new/startup/change tells of loans.business_age_description with an ORDINAL label-free score: 'Startup, Loan Funds will Open Business' strongest (near-explicit Feb-15-2020 eligibility red flag — funds will OPEN the business), then 'New Business or 2 years or less', then 'Change of Ownership'. Does NOT fire on 'Existing or more than 2 years old' OR 'Unanswered' (never score missing-as-suspicious). Evidence dict carries business_age_description, date_approved, the matched tell, and a short grounded reason. Read-only; never writes.
LABEL-FREE: never reads fraud_cases — proven by a test that runs on a seeded tmp_path warehouse with an EMPTY fraud_cases table and asserts identical signals.

Registered in registry.exploratory_detectors() ONLY — all_detectors() UNCHANGED (SIGN-010); get_detector('business_recency') resolves it; registry docstring updated (built + tested; pending real-data validation).

tests/test_business_recency.py (seeded tmp_path): fires on the three tells with monotonic scores; quiet on 'Existing…' and 'Unanswered'; deterministic; 'business_recency' in exploratory_detectors() and NOT in all_detectors(); resolves via get_detector; never queries fraud_cases.
Verification passes (uv run --extra vision --extra graph pytest && uvx ruff check .)
features.notes: The cheap, high-value core: a free, no-API, label-free signal validatable on the held-out labels with zero rate limit. Motivation: Benesch 53% fabricated/backdated; PPP required operation by Feb-15-2020. CRITICAL: 'Unanswered' must NOT fire.

features.title: EvidenceProvider + StubProvider + token-gated OpenCorporatesProvider (offline)
acceptanceCriteria: New src/relief_probe/kyb/__init__.py + src/relief_probe/kyb/provider.py: KybEvidence frozen dataclass (registration_date | None, is_non_registered: bool, address_type | None, matched_name | None, match_confidence: float, source: str, raw_ref | None for attribution); EvidenceProvider Protocol with fetch(name, state, *, amount=None) -> KybEvidence | None.

StubProvider: deterministic, fixture-backed (keyed by normalize_name), ZERO network — the default in tests. OpenCorporatesProvider: lazy `import requests` inside methods (module imports with no network at import time), mirrors labels/doj.py backoff (requests.Session + time.sleep(2**attempt), catch (requests.RequestException, ValueError)); raises a clear RuntimeError mentioning OPENCORPORATES_TOKEN if the token is unset (mirror LlmJudge._ensure_client); disambiguates candidates via resolve.normalize_name + US_STATES + score_match and accepts only above a documented confidence threshold (else returns a low-confidence best or None — wrong-entity is a defamation/FP harm, not just a metric); caches each response JSON to raw_dir()/kyb/<key>.json with cache-by-existence.
config.py gains kyb_cache_dir() (mirrors raw_dir) and opencorporates_token() -> str | None.

tests/test_kyb_provider.py — NO network: (a) OpenCorporatesProvider().fetch(...) raises RuntimeError mentioning OPENCORPORATES_TOKEN when unset; (b) StubProvider returns deterministic KybEvidence for known names, None for unknown; (c) injected-transport test (monkeypatch requests.Session.get or inject session=) parses a canned OpenCorporates JSON -> KybEvidence AND writes a cache file, then a second fetch reads the cache WITHOUT calling the transport; (d) disambiguation: two same-named companies in different states -> score_match picks the loan_state match; ambiguous -> low match_confidence; (e) corrupt/truncated cache JSON is detected and re-fetched (or surfaced clearly), never crashes.
Verification passes
features.notes: requests is already a CORE dependency — NO new extra. The whole external client is testable with an injected transport; never a real call in tests. raw_ref stores the OpenCorporates company URL for the share-alike/attribution obligation.

features.title: Enrich-over-top-k + optional agentic dossier synthesis (offline)
acceptanceCriteria: New src/relief_probe/kyb/enrich.py: a MAX_KYB hard-cap constant (small, aligned with the free-tier ~50/day — documented in code, not a fabricated metric); enrich_top_k(con, provider, *, top_k, max_concurrency) -> {'enriched': [...], 'telemetry': {...}} that pulls composite_ranking(con, limit=top_k), clamps to MAX_KYB, fans out over a bounded ThreadPoolExecutor (mirror LlmJudge), and returns telemetry (requested, enriched, cap_hit, n_cache_hits, n_errors, quota_exhausted). Refines the Tier-A score with the provider's evidence per lead.

Graceful mid-run quota exhaustion: a provider that raises a quota/429-style error after N calls -> the run stops cleanly, telemetry records quota_exhausted=True, and already-cached/enriched results are preserved (no data loss, no crash).

synthesize_dossier(lead, evidence, *, model=None): a deterministic grounded summary by default (mirror similarity/explain.deterministic_summary, no key needed); a key-gated LLM narration behind the `agent` extra + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (mirror agent/graph._synthesize_narrative + similarity/explain.explain_cluster) that narrates ONLY grounded facts with 'lead not proof' language and raises a clear RuntimeError if the extra/key is absent.

tests/test_kyb_enrich.py (seeded tmp_path, StubProvider, NO network): end-to-end enrich with correct telemetry (cap_hit true when top_k > MAX_KYB); the quota-exhausted test; the cache-hit test (re-run uses cache, provider.fetch not re-invoked, n_cache_hits increments); synthesize_dossier deterministic path needs no key; its LLM path raises the clear RuntimeError without the extra/key (importorskip-guarded for the present-extra case).
Verification passes
features.notes: Mirror the M7 triage cost-bounding exactly (hard cap + bounded concurrency + telemetry). The 'agentic' part is the optional LLM dossier narrator — grounded, key-gated, never invents. Default path is fully deterministic + offline.

features.title: CLI kyb-enrich + Tier-A read-only validation harness
acceptanceCriteria: cli.py: @app.command(name='kyb-enrich') with --top-k, --max-concurrency, --stub/--live (default --stub = offline StubProvider), --llm; --live uses OpenCorporatesProvider and raises the clear token RuntimeError if OPENCORPORATES_TOKEN is unset (caught -> yellow message -> Exit(1), mirroring triage/similar). Prints a telemetered results table + the leads-not-proof disclaimer.

New scripts/validate_business_recency.py — READ-ONLY (connect(read_only=True)); ranks the $150k+ slice by the label-free business-recency score; evaluates ONLY on the H7 out-of-time holdout (temporal_label_split(con, HOLDOUT_YEAR) test set, charged > holdout) via ranking_metrics + positive_rank_stats; prints the CONTRAST (mean percentile + recall@k) vs the base rate AND vs the production composite on the SAME held-out labels; honest caveats in the docstring (mirror validate_ring_graph.py). An honest NEGATIVE is a valid documented outcome. MUST NOT write to the warehouse.

tests/test_validate_business_recency.py — load the script via importlib.util.spec_from_file_location (proves it imports with no extra at module load), assert HOLDOUT_YEAR is an int and the pure label-free score helper is monotonic / deterministic; NEVER touches the real warehouse (mirror tests/test_validate_ring_graph.py).
relief-probe kyb-enrich --help works in the core env; default --stub runs offline; ruff clean.
Verification passes
features.notes: The real validate_business_recency.py run on the warehouse is done OUTSIDE the loop (no rate limit for Tier A). The loop only builds + unit-tests the harness's pure parts.

features.title: Docs + RESPONSIBLE_USE (ToS/FCRA) + honest disposition
acceptanceCriteria: README: catalog business_recency under the EXPLORATORY detectors + a KYB layer section — Tier-A (free business-age recency, validatable now) vs Tier-B (external OpenCorporates registration date / non-registered / address type, rate-limited), the optional agentic LLM dossier, the relational/external-evidence thesis, and the deterministic-first/key-gated/exploratory disposition. NO benchmark/lift numbers.

RESPONSIBLE_USE.md: a KYB section — KYB names real businesses/people; FCRA-ADJACENCY when scoring named INDIVIDUALS / sole-proprietors (vs registered entities); defamation/false-positive harm from wrong-entity matches; OpenCorporates ToS (free-tier SHARE-ALIKE + ATTRIBUTION via the stored raw_ref, NO account-creation-to-bypass-gates, rate limits); every output is a LEAD for review, not proof.

NEXT_STEPS.md: a 'Loop 5 — agentic-KYB external evidence' entry — Tier-A built exploratory; the MANUAL post-loop steps: (1) run scripts/validate_business_recency.py for the Tier-A held-out verdict, (2) the Tier-B real OpenCorporates run (kyb-enrich --live, rate-limited ~50/day, legally reviewed). Cite Benesch 53% + Griffin et al. as MOTIVATION, not as our results. Qualitative only — no fabricated metrics.
No invented numbers; SIGN-010 exploratory status stated; tests still green; ruff clean.
Verification passes
features.notes: Docs only. Leave Tier-A numbers as a placeholder / to-be-filled (the real run is outside the loop). Bake in the legal/ToS surface honestly — this is the most legally-sensitive layer in the project.
